simple_types.name: Command_Type
simple_types.code:
type Command_Type is (Check_DAK,
                      Check_NMK,
                      Discover,
                      Get_Capabilities,
                      Get_Discover_List,
                      Get_HFID,
                      Get_Id_Info,
                      Get_Network_Info,
                      …,
                      Set_NMK);

subprograms.name: Check_DAK
Check_NMK
Discover
subprograms.code:
function Discover (Network_Device_Name : String;
                   PLA_MAC_Address     : MAC_Addresses.MAC_Address_Type) return Power_Line_Adapter_Sets.Set

subprograms.name: Get_Capabilities
subprograms.code:
function Get_Capabilities (Network_Device_Name : String;
                           PLA_MAC_Address     : MAC_Addresses.MAC_Address_Type) return Power_Line_Adapters.Capabilities_Type

Get_Id_Info
